Basics.title: ▀ Eagle ▀
Basics.titleDisc: If you already own the 5th rank of German aircraft or ground vehicles, you will receive a unique title dedicated to 3 Year Anniversary of War Thunder!

titles.name: -- III --
titles.disc: Receive a title dedicated to 3 Year Anniversary of War Thunder. Just login to the game between the 30th of October and the 2nd of November.

titles.name: Brother in Arms
titles.disc: All War Thunder players will find a new title in their profile.

titles.name: Let’s go!
titles.disc: Another milestone in the history of War Thunder has been reached - 121,784 players that were online at the same time! May these memorable title stop you forgetting about that achievement.
